entry.title: Update Partner Address during Sales document Creation in Exit MV45AFZZ
entry.content:
Hello Experts: 

ive been trying to solve this but havent found any threads so heres my issue: 

i have a requirement in which using ABAP i need to update a SHIPTO Partner's adress, this im trying to do inside the user exit MV45AFZZ in the USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE specifically. 

im using ADDR_GET to fetch the information of the WE Address to get the Ship to Address.

im passing that info along with my changes with bapi 'ADDR_UPDATE'  which gives me no errors what so ever. 

then i use ADDR_MEMORY_SAVE and to this the system gives me the Exception "Address_number_missing" and then i run ADDR_MEMORY_CLEAR

from debugging i can see 2 things: 1.- that the address im trying to change ( fetched from XVBPA and XVBADR) is the Master data but when i create manually a Sales order i can see that if i change any values to the date, it creates a separate Addres number which cointains the specific data of that partner's address in the Sales document (VBPA) but that number is not being created when i dont change anything  to the partner's address at the point of my User exit's code. 

This makes me thing that i might need to create the address number or at least indicate it somehow.

 

Has anyone done anything like this or has any threads with the information i need to 
"CHANGE BUSINESS PARTNER's ADDRESS DURING SALES ORDER CREATION' 

 

Thanks i really appreciated.

entry.title: Re: I want to stay on the same screen when I close the error message
entry.content: Of course, removing SET SCREEN is useless, because, as I said, SET SCREEN isn't reached. The problem is due to MESSAGE TYPE 'E'. I have given the link to the documentation. It seems that you don't understand the documentation of the statement MESSAGE.

entry.title: SAP PEO End to End cycle
entry.content:
Intro:

PEO is an advanced version of PP with a separate license. Notably version-controlled BOM, Routings. This means no need to work with ECN and date combinations. The BOM/Routing with the latest version will only be active. We can hold production orders, display operation instructions in HTML format, and do other things. 

PEO - Production and Engineering Operation

Engineering = Designing the BOM and Routing

Operation = Completing Complex Operation

Overview:

Before start producing a material (product) business team will create a project code(used as ECN Number in SAP) in the PLM system. Against that, all the changes (components, operations, Inspection instructions, safety guidance, Machine, tools, time, and cost) related to the material will be recorded. Later they will design the product using CAD software and move design diagrams to PLM. Then later PDIM will be used to move the product data structure (Artifacts) like BOM and routing to SAP for proceeding further with actual manufacturing operations, MRP, and other FI activities. 

Now consider the product is designed in PLM and moved to SAP as an EBOM. But here I don't have integration. So I am creating EBOM directly in Fiori.

Note: See config perquisites at the bottom

Creating EBOM in Maintain Bill of material app.

 

Release it after creation. Otherwise system will not open EBOM in VEMP

Now let us say the data from PLM is moved to SAP as EBOM (draft). Hereafter people working on SAP will check the BOM components. If there are changes they will do changes to EBOM in SAP VEMP and convert it to MBOM (actual shopfloor BOM) to start production.
Business cases:
The conversion step is optional. If business sure that the they don't need EBOM, they can directly create MBOM from PLM. Also the necessity of PLM also optional. They can directly create EBOM and start editing it in VEMP (Visual Enterprise Manufacturing Planner) and convert it to MBOM.

Converting the EBOM to MBOM via Tcode VMP_MAINTAIN in VEMP

Click create on initial screen

Use 05 in next screen and click. Then give the material, Current BOM usage, target usage and other details. Then click save and start planning.

Here can do changes and Convert the EBOM to MBOM. In next screen select the line item, Click arrow icon in 1st panel and click arrow icon in 3rd panel and save it.

I am not doing any changes here. If you need changes you need to move the material from target panel to working panel and move it back to target panel. (Hover over the icons to get idea)

If drawing .vds files are used to create BOM then visuals will be shown here in VEMP. Here I have not create via VDS.

After saving an MBOM version will be shown in Maintain bill of material app

Note: Release the MBOM if not released properly.

Creating shopfloor routing via transaction MSFR1

Give the necessary data and click execute. As we are creating shopfloor routing in MSFR1 transaction the routing type will be defaulted to V. Routing Usage will be same 1 Production.

Click the Create icon to add operation and activity. 

Click structure workspace to change screens from operation to components assignment. You can drag-drop components to assign them to operation.

At last click release. On release production version will be created automatically.

You can get these master data in Manage shop floor routing and Manage production version Fiori apps.

Also, you can add work instructions to routing at the activity level.

Operation Part starts

Create production order via CO01.

Confirmation Method 1:

The Operator will directly get a list of operations to be completed via the Manage Work Center Queue.

In the Next screen, he can start the operation activity.

Later he can complete the operation via the Perform operation activity app.

The start, pause, and resume options are available to capture the time stamps of qualified operators. In aircraft companies, some operations are performed by some special operator and they charge on an hourly basis. This option will be useful in such cases to record their efforts. The completed operation can be seen in the Manage Work center Queue.

Note: To use the Manage work center queue assign your work center in the Manage User Settings Fiori app

Confirmation Method 2:

The Planner can assign the work to specific operators via the Assign Work app.

Later Operator gets a list of activities to complete from the My Work Queue app

 

Then he will complete it with the Perform Work app. You can see the work instructions can be displayed aa HTML format

If there are changes to BOM then it will be recorded to the change record (not Change Number). Go to the Manage change record app to get the CR.

Then click the arrow button to open it. Inside you will get the list of the objects assigned to it. Click analyze impacts to get a detailed analysis.

In the Next screen, you can get the list of orders regarding the material.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Configuration Prerequisites:

Activate this extensions to use PEO

SIMG - Production - Manufacturing for Production Engineering and Operations - General Settings - Activate Features and Acknowledge License Obligations.

Create new BOM usages in SIMG - Production - Basic Data - Bill of Material - General Data - BOM Usage - Define BOM Usages.

Note: Usage E&P are generally used a Engineering/planning BOM (draft), V is used a MBOM i.e. shopfloor/Manufacturing BOM

Set status for BOM Usage under SIMG - Production - Basic Data - Bill of Material - General Data - BOM Usage - Define Default Values for the Item Status

Allow this usage for header material types under SIMG - Production - Basic Data - Bill of Material - General Data - Define Material Types Allowed for BOM Header

Allow this usage for item material types under SIMG - Production - Basic Data - Bill of Material - General Data - Item Data - Define Allowed Material Types for BOM Items

SIMG - Production - Manufacturing for Production Engineering and Operations - Production Engineering - Define Control Data for BOM Usage

This config will stop creating EBOM/PBOM/MBOM if its not created with version.

Three optional software - needed.

SAP Visual Enterprise Viewer, SAP Visual Enterprise Structure manager, SAP Visual Enterprise author.

Roles - to be assigned in SU01: SAP_BR_BOM_ENGINEER

SAP_BR_PRODN_ENG_DISC
SAP_BR_PRODN_ENG_DISC_CAM
SAP_BR_PRODN_ENG_DISC_EME
SAP_BR_PRODN_OPTR_DISC
SAP_BR_PRODN_OPTR_DISC_EPO
SAP_BR_PRODN_PLNR
SAP_BR_PRODN_PLNR_LEAN_MFG
SAP_BR_PRODN_PROC_SPCLST_CAM
SAP_BR_PRODN_PROC_SPCLST_EPO
SAP_BR_PRODN_SUPERVISOR_DISC
SAP_BR_PRODN_SUPRVSR_DISC_CAM
SAP_BR_PRODN_SUPRVSR_DISC_EPO

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Creating EBOM with .VDS 3D Diagrams.

Configure the DMS Doc Type.

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Document Management - Control Data - Define DMS Document Types

Now Create a document in CV01N with this document type.

Use the create option to upload the .VDS 3D file

Now you can use the DMS Doc to create the MBOM in VEMP

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Engineering change Record configuration: LINK

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - Basic Settings - Define Number Range Intervals for Change Records. 

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - Basic Settings - Define Object Types

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - Settings for Change Records - Define Item Relevance

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - User Statuses - Define User Statuses

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - User Statuses - Define User Status Profiles

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - User Statuses - Define User Status Actions

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - Settings for Change Records - Define Status Checks and Actions (Optional)

SIMG - Logistics General - Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) - Change Records - Settings for Change Records - Define Change Record Types. Give the number range and status profile that you created.

Make sure PEO relevant is checked. Otherwise, analyze impact will not be available in the change record.

Later you can create the Engineering change record in the Manage change record app.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Conclusion:

I hope this help you to understand the PEO process from top to bottom. Please comment if there are mistakes. Have look to link

entry.title: Re: DataObject Labels of BPMN Diagram
entry.content:
Good day Nonaka and welcome to the SAP Community.  We appreciate you sharing your post.  In regard to the position of data object labels, this is a known issue and is currently being worked on, with a fix to be released soon.  Unfortunately, I don't have an ETA of when the fix will take place at this time.

Kind regards,

Kantrice D

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
hi @SantanaGabriel 

Got you, the PrivateLink is the endpoint, in our case, AWS Glue connects to the Endpoint (SAP ODP), that is what I was asking if your SAP is hosted on AWS or not. In simple terms, you create an NLB and you attach it to a VPC Endpoint

In case SAP is hosted on AWS, looks like this;

In case it's on-prem, it is very similar, but you set the NLB’s target as the IP address of the on-prem SAP system through Direct Connect or VPN.

entry.title: Re: BDC / Batch Input for Sales Orders Custom Fields Tab
entry.content:
Read firtst those OSS notes:

  • 395853 - SD-EDI receipt: IDoc field not copied into document (consulting)
  • 1457805 - Fields not populating on inbound order IDOCs  (KBA)
  • 753153 - FAQ: Customer-functions in IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS 

And then look at EXIT_SAPLVEDA_001, EXIT_SAPLVEDA_002 of Enhancement (CMOD/SMOD) VEDA0001.

entry.title: People Analytics - Managers Story Visibility levels up in Hierarchy
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are reaching out regarding a specific requirement from our client. They would like to grant a group of managers visibility into a specific SAP Story. This story includes data that, by default, managers can view only within their standard "cone of visibility," which encompasses all levels down in the hierarchy.

The client is asking if it is possible to extend this visibility to include all levels up within the hierarchy as well. If a solution exists, it is critical that it does not affect the visibility rules already established in Employee Central.

Can you please support us?

Thank you

Giulia

entry.title: Re: Canvas, Table report migration to stories
entry.content: Canvas reports deprecation announcement has been withdrawn but what about table reports

Please suggest.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 2)
entry.content:
Very helpful Sandy,

Thanks

Anthony

entry.title: Simplifying SAP MDG IMG Configurations - Technical Settings for Master Data
entry.content:
In this blog, I will provide a simplified explanation of four key IMG configuration nodes related to the technical configuration of SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) on S/4HANA.
The SPRO configuration node path is as follows:"

TC: MDGIMG -> General Settings -> Technical Settings for Master Data:

  1. Node “Tansports”:
  2. Node “Client Copies”:
  3. Node “Profile Parameter Setting”:
  4. Node “Define MDG Landscape Profile”:

1. Node “Transports”

This node allows you to configure transport settings for MDG objects. It ensures that changes made in one system (e.g., Development) can be transported to another system (e.g., Quality or Production).

Transporting Customizing Settings from Client 100 to 110

  • The main purpose of the Wizard for RFC Destinations is to assist in setting up RFC (Remote Function Call) connections for communication between clients within the same SAP system or across systems, specifically for tasks related to transport methods (like transporting customizing settings or performing client copies).

Examples:

  • Transporting Customizing Settings: If you want to transport settings to client 110 from client 100 and you use the wizard to create the RFC connection by specifying 110 as the target client.
  • Create the RFC in Client 100. This is because the source client (100) needs to communicate with the target client (110) to execute transport-related activities.

2. Node “Client Copies”

This node manages settings for client copies in SAP systems. It allows you to replicate data, customizing, or user settings between clients in the same or different systems.

Client Copy (Config & Cust) from Client 100 to 110

The diagram represents a Local Client Copy Process in SAP MDG (Master Data Governance), illustrating the relationship between the following clients:

  • Client 000 (Admin Client): Used for global configurations and SAP MDG system-wide settings.
  • Client 100 (Configuration/Development Client): Where customizations and configurations are developed.
  • Client 110 (Target Client): Destination client for the local client copy.

Steps:

  • Create RFC Destination: Use the "Wizard for RFC Destinations" to define a target RFC connection. Example: Create an RFC destination with the name MDGTR@S21CLNT110, which points to Client 110.
  • Assign RFC Destination for Transport Methods: Link the RFC destination to transport methods (e.g., before-export and after-import processing).
  • Postprocessing Configuration: After configuration, use "Complete Postprocessing" to finalize settings within Client 100.

Data and configuration settings are copied from Client 100 to Client 110.

3. Node “Profile Parameter Setting”

This node helps you define and adjust SAP system profile parameters that influence the technical behavior of MDG.

Optimizing Profile Parameters for SAP MDG:

When setting up SAP MDG Application Framework, ensure proper configuration of profile parameters to avoid performance issues like memory bottlenecks.

One critical parameter is abap/shared_objects_size_MB, which determines the memory allocated for ABAP Shared Objects. For medium-sized systems, allocate 100–300 MB, adjusting based on additional requirements from other software layers.

Purpose of this configuration:

- The shared objects memory acts as a high-speed cache, reducing the load on the SAP HANA database and improving response times for users.

step-by-step explanation of the diagram:

1. Users like Purchasers, Sales, Production Team, and FI/Reporting teams access the SAP system through the SAP GUI.

2. The dispatcher manages and allocates tasks to available work processors.

3. Work processors handle the actual processing of tasks.

4. Shared Objects Allocation: The parameter abap/shared_objects_size_MB determines how much memory (e.g., 100 MB in diagram) is allocated for storing shared objects (Frequently accessed product master data is copied into shared memory for faster access).

5.The database holds the complete master data, and only frequently accessed data is moved to shared memory for better performance.

4. Node “Define MDG Landscape Profile”

This node is used to define landscape profiles that describe your MDG system setup, including central and connected systems.

Technical Settings "Define MDG Landscape Profile"

Customer Issue:

A customer using SAP MDG on ECC is facing significant performance issues with master data searches and duplicate checks.

Solution:

As an SAP MDG consultant, implement SAP HANA-based search and duplicate checks by leveraging SAP HANA as a secondary database.

Replicate MDG data into the SAP HANA search schema using tools like SAP Landscape Transformation (SLT) or other methods.

Establish and maintain a database connection to the SAP HANA schema for search operations.

This architecture enhances performance by utilizing SAP HANA's optimized search and duplicate-check capabilities.

#SAP #SAPMDG #SAPConfiguration #SPRO #IMGNodes #MasterDataGovernance #SAPS4HANA #SAPTransport #ClientCopy #ProfileParameters #MDGLandscape #SAPBlog #SAPConsultant #SAPTech #SAPExperts #DataGovernance #SAPHANA #SAPIntegration

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
@MarioDeFelipe 

In my case, my customer's SAP instance operates under the RISE with SAP model, hosted within an AWS account managed by SAP.

Previously, I successfully integrated Amazon AppFlow from the customer's AWS account with their private SAP OData Services. This was achieved using PrivateLink and an NLB, as illustrated in your screenshot.

One key difference between my architecture and your explanation is that the NLB was created and hosted in the customer's AWS account, rather than in the SAP-managed account.

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Partner Add-ons for on-premise & BTP ABAP SaaS
entry.content:
Hi @AustinKloske ,

great blog post ! You mentioned using a S/4HANA On-Premise system to develop add-ons before importing to ABAP Environment on BTP. Which option do you use to deploy such a system: 

  • Use of CAL subscription to quickly deploy a instance with partner dev licensing for S/4HANA?
  • Subscription to a shared system for partner?

Thanks! 

EC

Nitin

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content: @ClaudiaMayer @jonasben  Any idea when T4 2024 XML files will ready for testing ?

entry.title: Re: BDC / Batch Input for Sales Orders Custom Fields Tab
entry.content:
Thank you Raymond.

We do that in current ECC system and we don't have a problem there.

In S/4HANA, problem is with the "Custom Fields" app and the Tab activated by the fiori App.

Example:

 

In order to write the code in EXIT_SAPLVEDA_002 to update DXBDCDATA ( BDCDATA internal table ), we need screen field names for each of the fields.

Now, in the example above, the BDC field name for all three fields is the same.

That is the problem in S/4HANA using SAP tool to add custom fields.

Thank you.

entry.title: RECADV not available in WE81
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to create a Partner Profile in WE20 and when I add RECADV message type I get the message Logical message RECADV does not exist.

Any thoughts?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: B2B Integration Factory Q4/2024 Release highlights
entry.content:
@mert_oezkanthank you for posting this infomation.

The B2B Integration Factory is doing an excellent job but honestly, all this is so **bleep** useful, and sorry for my blunt comment, but I just can't understand why all this isn't provided immediately and directly through the standard "Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management V2" package that is made avaialble in the Discovery section of Int Suite - Cloud Integration.

Please do your own internal SAP teams discussions and move all your work to the "official" and supported release channels.

entry.title: Re: Modern Compliance Training in Learning Module Success...

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Accounting End Year Close

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Real-time user provisioning using SAP Cloud Identity Service (Identity Provisioning)
entry.content: Can we use SAP Initiated applications as source and target systems. If yes can we change the transformation mapping?

entry.title: Re: Master Data Management: The Foundation for Modern Enterprise Data Architecture
entry.content: Very Good Article, quick question if a company already implemented another Multi-domain MDM Solution, which include some of these domains out of box such as informatica Finance 360, Supplier 360, Material 360, is it still worth to implement SAP MDG or better to tweak existing solution and use for S4HANA implementation.

entry.title: Re: I need to add a date dimension prompt to a universe
entry.content: I made a bad assumption.  If you just want to prompt for a date and pass it to the report, go back to where I posted to add an object to your business layer.  You can add a Dimension object, click on the SQL Assistant for the SELECT, and choose your Parameter object that you defined.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Webinars 2024 - PT BR
entry.content:
Nós do time de SAP Cloud ALM temos o prazer de convidá-los para assistirem às gravações dos nossos webinars de 2024 sobre SAP Cloud ALM. Este ano, cobrimos uma série de tópicos essenciais que certamente serão de grande valia para a sua jornada em SAP Cloud ALM. As sessões incluem tópicos de introdução ao produto e implementação.

Não perca a oportunidade de se atualizar com as últimas práticas e tendências no uso do SAP Cloud ALM. As gravações estarão disponíveis em nossa plataforma e com links na tabela abaixo, você  também pode assistir a qualquer momento que lhe for conveniente. Desejamos que você aproveite ao máximo esses conteúdos e esperamos que sejam benéficos para o seu trabalho.

Webinars em Português-BR - 2024

Link da Gravação

SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session

Acesse aqui

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Design Phase

Acesse aqui

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Build Phase

Acesse aqui

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Test Phase

Acesse aqui

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Deploy Phase

Acesse aqui

entry.title: Re: RECADV not available in WE81
entry.content:
Hello @flaviolemos_prio 

ALE logical message types are defined in WE81. RECADV is not there in standard S/4HANA setup.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: LINK TO COMMENT - ERROR 403 FORBIDDEN
entry.content:
Good day ProBtp,

Thank you for your inquiry on the SAP Community.  For further assistance,  

please create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password). 
You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component that is affected.
 
Kind regards,
 
Kantrice D

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Webinars 2024 - Español
entry.content:
Nosotros del equipo de SAP Cloud ALM tenemos el placer de invitarlos a ver las grabaciones de nuestros webinars de 2024 sobre SAP Cloud ALM. Este año, cubrimos una serie de temas esenciales que sin duda serán de gran valor para su viaje en SAP Cloud ALM. Las sesiones incluyen temas de introducción al producto y su implementación.

No pierda la oportunidad de actualizarse con las últimas prácticas y tendencias en el uso de SAP Cloud ALM. Las grabaciones estarán disponibles en nuestra plataforma y con enlaces en la tabla a continuación, también puede verlos en cualquier momento que le sea conveniente. Esperamos que disfrute al máximo estos contenidos y que sean beneficiosos para su trabajo.

Webinars 2024 - Español

Link

SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session

Accede aquí

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Design Phase

Accede aquí

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Build Phase

Accede aquí

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Test Phase

Accede aquí

SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation: Deploy Phase

Accede aquí

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 2
entry.content:
Hello @matthias_schmalz,

I have a CAP application whose implements an Odata that serves other fullstack CAP applications acting as a integration orquestrator with S/4HANA on--premise, and my odata stores the logs processing info in a log table on HANA Cloud (for example, an sales order succefully generated or an error in a po creation). The communication between this orquestrator and other CAP apps is with auth token forwarding. This CAP app is not bindable (it does not have an service broker for it), it's just a regular application running in CF.

Obs.: the xsuaa instance is service-plan = application, and it have some scopes defined in a xs-security.json to control access to the odatas endpoints

My intent is to have an UI library with a Log reusable component (free style and fiori elements reusable), to easily enable other apps to incorporate log exibition in it's own screens (I have a total of 15 apps to implement this functionality). As my library odata should be the Orquestrator CAP application (log entity), I implemented the library inside this CAP application (I know that a better approach would be separate the front from the backend, but it was a customer request to keep front and back together). 

So I've started to try to make it work without a service broker, but with destination content only. Now I see that this will not be possible, unless I change all applications to work at the same destination service.

Obs. 2: In those tryies I had created a destination to the library resolves the CAP odata (dest. fs-agr-ct-motor-intercomp-srv-api).

Now I'm trying to change the mta.yaml to use a service broker, so I've created the broker folder in the project, a new xsuaa instance with service plan broker, and the broker config in mta.yaml:

But I still had doubts if this is correct, and how the library it's gonna to access the application destination fs-agr-ct-motor-intercomp-srv-api if now it's gonna be a new instance binded to the consumer application. Should this destination be a subaccount destination? My library xs-app.json it's with the follow routing:

In my consumer app, I understand that I must bind an instance of my reuse service to the CAP application and create a route like:
{
"source": "^/api/documents/info$",
"target": "info",
"authenticationType": "xsuaa",
"service": "btp.samples.consumed.service",
"endpoint": "api"
},

I'm still confuse if this is a correct approach in my scenario, or if there is a simpler way to achieve this using destination content.

entry.title: Re: Where can I start learning SAP S/4HANA Utilities?
entry.content: Is there a utilities-related certification? I learned that the IS-U ERP implementation cert was discontinued in 2023. Are they working on a new certification for Utilities?

entry.title: Re: BDC / Batch Input for Sales Orders Custom Fields Tab
entry.content: So, those are CFL (Custom Fields and Logic) created fields not compliant with BDC, and required some BAPI allowind EXTENSUININ usually or switch to another fiori compliant technology.

entry.title: Re: RECADV not available in WE81
entry.content: Dominik, is there any alternative or should I create a ZRECADV ?

entry.title: Re: Multimodel Scenario without ASR
entry.content: Thanks for your responses Saurabh. I have already gone through those information. However, I do not want to be subject to some of the constraints (such as use of shipping point as TM location and lose the ability to use one-time TM location). As such, I was wondering whether I can use the multimodal functionality without activating ASR. We are only using IM and no EWM so do not need all the other features stated. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Jump start to becoming a Partner Cloud solution Architect(PCA) for RISE with SAP with short reco
entry.content:
Hello togheter

I think the PCA role is over; see information from SAP

Indirect Selling for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Assets for Partners in a Cloud Architect Role

Regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 2
entry.content:
An update @matthias_schmalz: I've made it work as in the sample https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-launchpad-ui-samples/tree/main/btp-samples-split-destination

I've just created the destinations with sap.cloud.service = br.agr.fs.motor.lib in the consumer application, and it worked in workzone, but after that for some reason, the workzone started to give me an error of duplicate sap.app/id

Obs.: i'm not using CDM in this scenario, it will be my next attempt if this approach using the HTML5 apps provider do not works.

entry.title: Re: Modern Compliance Training in Learning Module Success...
entry.content: As far as the content provider can follow the Open Content Network (OCN) Implementation process, their courses could be accessed via Learning.

entry.title: Re: Send purchase order automatically by email to one spe...
entry.content: Were you able to find a way to create a rule that for a certain order type, such as contract consumption, no email is sent to the supplier?

entry.title: SAP DM ST 2200 - ESEF packages - how to exclude the reportPackages.json file
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am currently using SAP DM ST2200. Created a new ESEF package - there is a reportPackages.json file in the META-INF folder.

According to the latest report package specification, new .xbri packages must contain json files specifying their type.
However, the package that currently generates SAP DM ST2200 is in .zip format, so the .json file in the package is optional.

Unfortunately, I could not find any parameter in the XBRL report configuration that would exclude this file from the package.
How to exclude the .json file from the package?

I expect a system solution, not a manual “correction” of the package contents.

Regards

Iwona

entry.title: Re: Questions by Partners on SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition – Part 4
entry.content:
Hello togher

We have seen the latest communication from SAP regarding SAP PCA (Partner Cloud Architect).
Now we ask ourselves what is left of it or how the whole process works now.

For example, does SAP carry out every technical assessment itself?
Or does SAP always fill out the COF?

See this: 

Indirect Selling for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Assets for Partners in a Cloud Architect Role

Effective 1st Jan 2025, all NEW indirect opportunities will be processed by SAP ECS CAA team. PCA's are no longer required to submit TVRF's for review. Please request the IAE's/MSE's to raise a CAA request internally. All existing opportunities handled by PCA's which have slipped into Q1 2025 can be RESUBMITTED by PCA's UNTIL 31st Jan 2025. The RESUBMISSION link will be kept active until then and the TVRF review process will be supported. PCA's should use the RESUBMISSION link to ensure continuity of their TVRF reviews. No new submissions will be accepted. Any deal that goes beyond 31st Jan 2025 will be taken over by the SAP CAA Team. A handover MUST be performed by the PCA to the SAP CAA for such deals.

Please note that ALL deals that have been processed/will be processed (until 31st Jan 2025) under the PCA model needs to be taken through to successful Sales to Delivery handover. SAP will not take over such deals

 

Do you have any idea, what all will change and how?

Regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Automatic HU creation after exception code NEXT
entry.content:
Hi Reinerinkrob,

Thanks for your reply on this matter!

Best regards,

Michaël

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Instance Refresh
entry.content:
Hello Sri,

Yes, this can be done through IRT or Manual refresh request.

In case you're referring to 2 instances at same Customer ID and same Data Center, you can refer to KBA 2791468 - Instance Refresh Tool for BizX & LMS | Must-Know Guide & FAQ - SAP for Me for guidance on Instance Refresh Tool.

If source and target instances are from different Customer ID or it falls under IRT limitations, we can perform this request manually as described on KBA 2277508 - SuccessFactors Cloud Manual Instance Refresh Process & FAQ - SAP for Me - providing the form from Attachments section full filled in a new support case raised in LOD-SF-PLT-REF.

I hope this clarifies 🙂

Best,
Brenda

entry.title: Re: Master Data Management: The Foundation for Modern Enterprise Data Architecture
entry.content:
Hello and thank you.

One of the biggest benefits of SAP MDG is that it is a part of SAP S/4HANA so it is just a matter of enabling it - and then is comes with pre-built data models, business rules, workflows, and user interfaces based on S/4HANA.  In terms of SAP MDG use for your actual S/4HANA implementation, there is much value (e.g. customer-vendor integration).  Here is a good detailed piece on the value: https://www.sap.com/documents/2018/01/1e587ecc-e97c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html.

Hope that helps.

Corrie

entry.title: Re: Everything About SAP Idocs in S/4 HANA
entry.content: Good work Kamlesh.

entry.title: Good Evening
entry.content: When can I apply for the next free exam attempt?

entry.title: Re: Creating unit test data in the RAP context
entry.content: @felixw I found the parameter 'i_select_base_dependencies' in the create method signature. By setting it to 'true', you can use base table types when creating test data.

entry.title: Re: BDC / Batch Input for Sales Orders Custom Fields Tab
entry.content: Thank you for the quick solution.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Adaptation Transport Organizer
entry.content:
I have the same question as Kadudura.

Where / How is the Sandbox package / Prefix used?

Every object we create is going into Prefix defined for "Local Package"

I don't see any option to use Sandbox Prefix and I could not find documentation when I searched for Sandbox Prefix

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Learner View does not show content
entry.content:
Hi Tommaso,

Outside of creating and publishing the content, you must assign the content to individual user groups before they can access the content through the Learner View tab.  Watch this video for details about how to do that.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Distance Metric - Best Matching Technician
entry.content:
While using the Best Matching Technician, the travel information section is showing the distance in km (Refer attachment). How can we show the distance in miles? Is there a setting that controls it?

The company dto don't have a value defined for distanceMetric.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now and Help Menu for Web Dynpro apps
entry.content:
Hi,

From the details above, I think that you are trying to use the SAP GUI Help Extension to distribute your content to end users.  This interface is covered by this documentation.  When I go through the documentation, I can see that it covers SAP GUI and GUI for HTML functionality but there is no mention of Web Dynpro apps.  If this is the interface that you are trying to use, raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR and see if the support team has any additional information that they can share about this scenario.

Outside that, it might be necessary to use another mechanism to distribute the content, e.g. SAP Companion for Desktop.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: connect to mssql Database
entry.content:
Hello, i used CrystalReport in Version 2016, there i can connect to my mssql Database by ODBC.
Now we have update to CrystalReport Version 2020 there i found no connection to mssql / ODBC

 

where is my mistake?

entry.title: Connect PostgreSQL after SSH by CrystalReport
entry.content:
Hi, we have CrystalReport in 2020 and 2016

2016 i can work with my "old" Database, in 2020 i find no Database. There i have a second question in the community.

 

now we have a second server, this server (docker) i only arrive by SSH.

is there any way in CrystalReport 2016 or 2020 to connect the PostgreSQL Database over SSH

Is this the intended behavior? Is there a setting to view all activities regardless of the planning scenario selected in the Dispatching board?

entry.title: Re: Tenant and domain in SAP Analytic Cloud
entry.content: Thanks! However, I have an initial question. For all clients with the tenant "hcs.cloud," I don't have any issues using the SAC Add-in. I simply download the add-in, log in to the tenant, and work with SAC without problems. Now, for the tenant "analytics.cloud," when I try to use the SAC Add-in, Excel opens a blank page, and the SAC Add-in fails to log in to the tenant. I came across this article on the web that might be related to the issue/different configuration: SAP Help Documentation - SAC Office Add-In. Have you ever needed to perform this configuration?

entry.title: Re: Tenant and domain in SAP Analytic Cloud
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_OFFICE/2b73edbc8f8f4189a36bc7a2e038185c/db2f874261824d63adb3ca198f65ce55.html

entry.title: Display of FSCM Worklist Headers for the Aging Buckets - Overdue Period x vs Overdue 31-60
entry.content: We have several different collection groups in FSCM.  Each Account specialist can have customers from one to several different collection groups assigned to them.  When they go into their worklist, if their customer assignments have different collection groups, the header for their open items is displayed with the header of Overdue Period X.  If you go into the worklist with one specific collection group, you will get the header display as the  set aging buckets (1-30,31-60, etc.)  you have in your strategies.  If all collection groups are set with the same aging buckets, is there a way to get the header to display with the 1-30,31-60, etc. in the worklist by user and multiple collection groups?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape, parallel line – High Level Introduction
entry.content:
In this blog, I will offer a glimpse into the near future of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, which will introduce a new approach to managing special testing topics to support a public cloud deployment (SAP Labs Preview Only) using a concept called the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape, parallel line.

Before we jump to the future, I would like to provide a high-level overview of some of the most common SAP tasks, such as data migration, sandbox setup, and data refresh, and how you can achieve them today with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Client copies and client refreshes, while common practices in on-premise environments (such as SAP ERP 6.0 or SAP S/4HANA), are not included in the standardized operational procedure design or SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Some customers and partners, influenced by traditional on-premise tasks, may believe they can perform client copies, either local or remote, as they do on-premise. However, they later realize this is not possible.

As explained in some of my other blogs, such as Accelerated Business Transformation – Moving from SAP ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, has a different system design (e.g., multi-tenancy, SaaS, operations provided by SAP, security considerations, etc.). In the public cloud, we offer different methods to implement and operate the system compared to the traditional on-premise counterparts. This distinction is crucial to ensure system readiness for continuous innovation upgrades and to maintain high standards of operational procedures.

Data Migration: The execution of data migration in the public cloud today is outlined in SAP Activate and utilizes the SAP Data Migration Cockpit. This process is primarily carried out using the concept of delta migration. We recommend our customers first simulate the migration and then perform delta migration tests until everything is ready and verified. Thousands of customers have successfully followed this approach. For additional information, you can check the following links: https://www.sap.com/documents/2023/11/c076b9ef-967e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html  & https://www.sap.com/documents/2020/07/7a263781-a67d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.html

There are times when customers and partners wish to perform data migration mock-up loads, where they load data and then delete (or refresh) it in test or productive systems. This allows them to conduct as many full mock-up loads as needed or to correct any data loaded incorrectly. Unfortunately, this traditional practice is not included in our standardized operational procedures, so it cannot be performed. Therefore, it is advisable to always plan migrations using delta loads with simulation in mind, as described above.

SAP Data Migration Cockpit

Sandbox:  We offer our customers the option to subscribe to a Sandbox; however, unlike traditional basis tasks, you cannot copy your development or testing system or move configuration transports to a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition - Sandbox. While we provide the ability to have a Sandbox in the public cloud, the Sandbox remains independent and aligns more with the concept of "fit to standard." This means the Sandbox becomes a reference system for SAP Best Practices that you can use to check and test. If customers want the Sandbox to more closely resemble their current development or testing system, they can configure and maintain the Sandbox, but this will require them to keep it up-to-date with their current configuration settings and data. Since SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition follows a fit-to-standard approach, I recommend using the Sandbox primarily as a reference system for SAP Best Practices. This will allow you to explore innovations and have an environment to simulate or test extensibility. The Sandbox also offers the advantage of allowing you to test scope item elements that might require an additional subscription, among other features. However, if you have a more complex scenario for a Sandbox, such as implementing a non-standard country using the CBC - Configuration Localization Toolkit, you may need to configure the Sandbox system accordingly.

Data Refresh: In the public cloud, we offer the Test Data Refresh (TDR) service. This service has an additional subscription cost and allows our customers to refresh production data (both master and transactional) to the test system on a predefined schedule that aligns with the public cloud maintenance schedule (including upgrades and hotfix collections). The service also provides the capability for data depersonalization, which is not possible with client copies. An additional advantage compared to a system copy is that no tedious post-refresh activities are required by the customer. Integrations continue to work as before since the refresh occurs at the database level. This service is an excellent alternative for running regression testing for upgrades or future rollouts using data that closely resembles production data. You can read more about the SAP TDR service here.

SAP Test Data Refresh – Check Your System Readiness App

Looking ahead - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape, parallel line is a state-of-the-art offering that provides enhanced testing flexibility in the public cloud using a parallel project line in addition to the main project line (see figure below). We will provide more information about the Parallel Project Line when it becomes generally available in the future, which is tentatively expected—subject to change—in the first half of 2025.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape, parallel line

We are planning to provide customers with one parallel project line as part of their current SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition subscription. The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition three-system landscape, parallel project line was created primarily for live customers to allow them a clear and flawless separation of activities in the "main line"—the line of their productive operations. This is especially useful during lifecycle events like upgrades, which bring new innovations to the productive environment. Customers can test and validate these innovations in a project line without impacting the main line of business operations. This includes scenarios such as the extension of new scopes or the rollout of new countries. Live customers can also use it for additional testing and validation of subsequent rollout waves or for proof of concepts or exploration. Customers who are not yet live and are working on their first implementation wave can also use it for data migration tests and ad-hoc training and testing environments. Therefore, the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape, parallel project line will provide ample flexibility to customers at any stage of their lifecycle.

To summarize, this new offering will allow us to introduce more testing flexibility into the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, including but not limited to:

A) Scope extensions in the parallel project line without impacting the main line, with the option to test and validate them in the parallel project line and then merge them back to the main line if successful.

B) Rollout of new non-standard countries using the Central Business Configuration – Configuration Localization Toolkit. The parallel project line will help test the new non-standard countries without the need for a Sandbox.

C) Organizational Structure Extension: Similar to scope extensions, customers will be able to test and validate organizational structure extensions in the parallel project line and then merge them back to the main line if successful.

D) Data Migration: You will be able to perform additional mock-up data migration loads with the ability to refresh (clear) the project line.

E) Build Integration: You will be able to test integrations using the parallel project line.

F) Ad-hoc Training & Testing Environment: You will be able to create an ad-hoc training or testing environment as needed.

G) Data Refresh to Parallel Project Line: The SAP Test Data Refresh Service is planned to be offered for the project line as well.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape, parallel line configuration – Organizational Structure Extension in Central Business Configuration.

I hope this content helps you understand how we plan to approach new testing methods that previously required traditional client copies in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the new SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition three-system landscape, parallel line as you prepare for your project.

I would like to thank my colleagues, Sophia Sommerrock and Nicola Pace, for their review and feedback on this blog.

Your insights and opinions are valuable, so please don't hesitate to contribute by adding comments to this blog.

More Information on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition:

    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, release info here
    • Product videos on our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP S/4HANA YouTube playlist
    • SAP S/4HANA PSCC Digital Enablement Wheel here
    • Early Release Webinar Series here
    • Inside SAP S/4HANA Cloud Podcast here
    • openSAP Microlearnings for SAP S/4HANA here
    • Best practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, here
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Community: here
    • Feature Scope Description here
    • What’s New here
    • Help Portal Product Page here

Follow us via @SAP and #S4HANA or follow @Marco_Valencia

entry.title: Re: Extensibility Overview SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
@JoEng Thanks for this wonderful series on C4C V2 extensibility possibilities. 

I have again few questions. You wrote on this blog post, "We support two types of Mashups. Simple IFrames and Web Components.". Do you already have an example about what is really a web component in C4C v2? How different web-component mashups are from the usual iframe mashups? When to use which type mash-up and what is SAP's recommendation.

I already checked help documentation, but couldnt the answer to these things.

Best Regards

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: connect to mssql Database
entry.content:
Crystal 2020 is 64-bit. 
Create a 64-bit ODBC DSN.

entry.title: Re: connect to mssql Database
entry.content: in which way can i make this?, is there any directions

entry.title: Re: Which tools do you use for CSV files?
entry.content:
When I'm in a large company, it's usually not so easy to roll out another Office suite alongside MS Office. The IT department doesn't see the added value of going to such great expense here.

So the recommendation from consultants and SAP is currently not satisfactory for me as a customer.

entry.title: Re: Which tools do you use for CSV files?
entry.content:
When I'm in a large company, it's usually not so easy to roll out another Office suite alongside MS Office. The IT department doesn't see the added value of going to such great expense here. So the recommendation from consultants and SAP is currently not satisfactory for me as a customer.

You can do this with the country changeover in the OS if it hasn't restricted IT.
It doesn't just change MS Excel, but all applications in my OS.
I can't do that to the business.

entry.title: Re: RE-FX Intereses
entry.content: I tried all the options in the 'Interest Calculation Method,' and none of them matched the exact amount. The user insists that there is a way to manually modify them or to input the calculation in some way, just as the bank has it, in order to achieve the EXACT monthly interest amount, but I still can't figure it out.

entry.title: Used FCH8 to void chk but vendor cashed check, how to reverse open invoices and void chk?
entry.content: I used FCH8 to void a check and this reopened the invoice, however, the vendor stated they did cash the check, and a reissue of payment is not needed. How do I reverse the void and open invoices?

entry.title: Re: Why are the "Screen" fields grayed out in Screen Stru...
entry.content: There seems to be a quirk (I'm tempted to call it a bug) in the interface here: After entering a value in an open "screen area" field and pressing Enter, the corresponding "screen" field is still greyed out. However, for some reason the field "Tab header" is then automatically selected, and pressing Enter while that field is selected then opens up the "screen" field for editing!

entry.title: WFA on HANA picking up onboarding users
entry.content:
Hello,

@YSE-1we have found that WFA is picking up users from onboarding, particularly the issue is that users only exist in onboarding and have not been yet hired in EC.

Any idea why this happens and how to properly remove those users from showing up in WFA?

Many thanks in advance!

Kind regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: Winning together: SAP Signavio Process Explorer and SAP Signavio Process Navigator join forces
entry.content:
Great blog

More products with similar names create confusion

Can SAP provide a clear picture of its customers on different Signavio of suite of products and their relationship with other SAP products

Regards

entry.title: WFA on HANA failed cube
entry.content:
Hello,

@YSE-1trying to build a pretty straightforward dimension based on a picklist field.

All the other dimensions were fine, this one breaks the build at around 19 minutes.

Tried creating a calculated column to bring the value from it, same. Tried fresh template and redo, same. Can t really see any reason for it..

18/11/2024 17:32:35ERROR:: [GIRRU: Hana Destination; Code: Hana Writer] (0) ===================================================
18/11/2024 17:32:35ERROR:: [Hana Destination] (0) Exception occured in Girru: SAP DBTech JDBC: [274]: inserted value too large for column: TrexUpdate failed on table 'BCXT1_OLAP_NEXT:FACT_TABLE_1_TEMP' with error: AttributeEngine: indexed value not within specified range;checkCesu8StringColumn(): max length (100) violated on pos 231, value='Pick n Pay, Shoprite, Absa, Cashbuild, TFG, Truworths, Woolworths, Mr Price Group, Queenspark & Clicks',column 'FACT_TABLE_1_A_33_BRANCH_ID', table '$table$', rc=6959(input position 246,522)
18/11/2024 17:32:35ERROR:: [Hana Destination [6293]] (-1073450910) InfoHRM.Girru.Components.InputProcessingException: Uncaught exception during input processing; Component=Hana Destination ---> com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.BatchUpdateExceptionSapDB: SAP DBTech JDBC: [274]: inserted value too large for column: TrexUpdate failed on table 'BCXT1_OLAP_NEXT:FACT_TABLE_1_TEMP' with error: AttributeEngine: indexed value not within specified range;checkCesu8StringColumn(): max length (100) violated on pos 231, value='Pick n Pay, Shoprite, Absa, Cashbuild, TFG, Truworths, Woolworths, Mr Price Group, Queenspark & Clicks',column 'FACT_TABLE_1_A_33_BRANCH_ID', table '$table$', rc=6959(input position 246,522) at com.sap.db.jdbc.CallableStatementSapDB.executeBatch() at com.sap.db.jdbc.trace.PreparedStatement.executeBatch() at HanaClientIkvm.IkvmHanaClient.CommitTransaction(Action`1 logger) at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.CoreWorkforce.HanaDestination.HanaWriter.Start(PipelineBuffer buffer) at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.SingleOutputWriter.ProcessInput(Int32 inputID, PipelineBuffer buffer) --- End of inner exception stack trace --- at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.PipelineComponentUtil.ReportDebugInfo(InputProcessingException e, Logger logger) at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.SingleOutputWriter.ProcessInput(Int32 inputID, PipelineBuffer buffer) at Microsoft.SqlServer.Dts.Pipeline.ManagedComponentHost.HostProcessInput(IDTSManagedComponentWrapper100 wrapper, Int32 inputID, IDTSBuffer100 pDTSBuffer, IntPtr bufferWirePacket)
18/11/2024 17:32:35ERROR:: [SSIS.Pipeline] (-1073450974) SSIS Error Code DTS_E_PROCESSINPUTFAILED. The ProcessInput method on component "Hana Destination" (6293) failed with error code 0x80131500 while processing input "DefaultInput" (6295). The identified component returned an error from the ProcessInput method. The error is specific to the component, but the error is fatal and will cause the Data Flow task to stop running. There may be error messages posted before this with more information about the failure.
18/11/2024 17:32:35INFORMATION:: [SSIS.Pipeline] (1074016264) Post Execute phase is beginning.

Many thanks in advance!

Kind regards,

Alex

entry.title: How to Route Assignment Approvers for Technical Roles When a Business Role is Created or Modified?
entry.content:
Hi experts!

 

I am seeking guidance on configuring a workflow in SAP GRC 10 to handle assignment approvers for technical roles that are newly added to a business role when it is created or modified.

Example:

 

  • If ROLE_TYPE = SIN (Simple Role):
    • The workflow should follow the standard approval process.
  • If ROLE_TYPE = BUS (Business Role):
    • The system should identify which technical roles are associated with the business role and handle them differently:
      • Existing Technical Roles (already assigned to the business role): No workflow should be triggered.
      • New Technical Roles (recently added to the business role): A workflow should be triggered that:
        1. Sends the request to the Assignment Approver for the technical role.
        2. After approval by the Assignment Approver, routes the request to the Business Role Content Approver.

Thanks in advance for your help!

#sap GRC #brf+ #msmp workflow #BRM AC

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA picking up onboarding users
entry.content: @abalasescu2 - WFA reports all the data that is available in Job Info table. If there is already a record in Job Info while the employee still doing onboarding, you need to add exclusion logic. You need to find out what/which field will tell you if this employee still onboarding or not and use it to exclude.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA failed cube
entry.content:
Hi @abalasescu2 - as per the error message:

inserted value too large for column: TrexUpdate failed on table 'BCXT1_OLAP_NEXT:FACT_TABLE_1_TEMP' with error: AttributeEngine: indexed value not within specified range;checkCesu8StringColumn(): max length (100) violated on pos 231, value='Pick n Pay, Shoprite, Absa, Cashbuild, TFG, Truworths, Woolworths, Mr Price Group, Queenspark & Clicks',column 'FACT_TABLE_1_A_33_BRANCH_ID', table '$table$', rc=6959(input position 246,522)

the value is too large for the calculated column.  There is example value mentioned in the error message as well (see red bold text above).  Try to increase the length of the calculated column.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to retrieve the encryption type of a outlook email file(.msg) technically?
entry.content:
The Microsoft outlook email is saved with encryption such as Unrestricted Access, Encrypt-Only, Do not Forward, confidential, internal, Secret, and etc. How to retrieve these information from the file using ABAP program?

ABAP Development NW ABAP Communication Services

entry.title: Re: How to Contact the Ariba Supplier Team

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Adaptation Transport Organizer
entry.content:
Hi A_Ramesh 

Ok so Sandbox versus Local Package is explained in SAP Note 2807979 - How to setup Adaptation Transport Organizer for S/4HANA On Premise system via S_ATO_SETUP

In practice sandbox package is relevant to a public cloud environment. We don't normally use it for private cloud customers.

entry.title: Re: How to add more records to an existing sap standard s...
entry.content: It did not work Raymond. Again thank you for replying. If ever you have alternatives please let me know.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Adaptation Transport Organizer
entry.content:
Hi Sathya_Gunasekaran

Ok so Custom Fields are always cross-client. So you only need to create it in one client and it applies to all clients. 

However for all such Key User activities - and remember key users are CRITICAL to Clean Core - you MUST have a working SAP Fiori environment with some data where you can run the apps and  make these key user changes.

In most cases we recommend using your Development "Unit Test" client. That is key user changes such as Custom Fields, Adapt Ui (e.g. to change visibility of fields, buttons, tabs, cards, etc. and to create public app views) are made in the Dev Unit Test client. Then usually you set up your transport landscape to:

a) Create customizing requests for Key User activities. Remember key users cannot create transport requests for themselves - so this is ALWAYS under your IT team's control. 

b) Transport these customizing requests from your Dev Unit Test back to your master config client

c) Then transport all customizing requests (key user and other config) to the rest of your landscape as normal.

Best

Jocelyn

entry.title: Re: DataObject Labels of BPMN Diagram
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I understand that this is a known issue and a fix is planned. I will wait for the fix, but I hope it can be implemented as soon as possible.

entry.title: Re: Build Custom Journal Entry Posting Service Based On I_JournalEntryTP By Creating Own RAP Object
entry.content:
Hi team.

I have the same problem that @fgfgfg3r43456534 

in my case y only create a demo code in a SE38 report using I_JOURNALENTRYTP 

    DATA lt_new TYPE TABLE FOR ACTION IMPORT i_journalentrytp~Post.

    INSERT VALUE #(
        %cid   = to_upper( cl_uuid_factory=>create_system_uuid( )->create_uuid_x16( ) )
        %param = VALUE #(
            companycode            = '1000'
            createdbyuser          = sy-uname
            accountingdocumenttype = 'SA'
            documentdate           = '20250108'
            postingdate            = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( )
            DocumentReferenceID    = |RAP: { sy-uname }|
            _glitems               = VALUE #(
*                ( glaccountlineitem = '1' glaccount = '0011002080' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '-100.55' currency = 'EUR' ) ) )
                ( glaccountlineitem = '1' glaccount = '824004' CostCenter = '12008'  _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '-10.55' currency = 'ARS' ) ) )
*                ( glaccountlineitem = '2' glaccount = '0070200000' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '100.55' currency = 'EUR' ) ) ) ) ) )
                ( glaccountlineitem = '2' glaccount = '130011' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '10.55' currency = 'ARS' ) ) ) ) ) )
           INTO TABLE lt_new.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_journalentrytp
           ENTITY journalentry
           EXECUTE post FROM lt_new
           FAILED DATA(ls_failed_deep)
           REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_deep).


but I have a dump. My system is S/4HANA private edition 2023

Could someone solve this dump?

Regards!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Resolving CDS view lifecycle impacts
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

Should the CDS views be fixed during the SUM process itself or after the upgrade? We have reached the ACT_UPG phase in SUM and a number of CDS views could not be activated. Fixing CDS views on the shadow instance during SUM seems to be very odd, especially considering that there is no way to find out the affected CDS views before starting SUM. On the other hand, continuing SUM with activation errors in these CDS views also does not seem to be correct.

thanks,

Deepak Appu

entry.title: Re: SAP DM ST 2200 - ESEF packages - how to exclude the r...
entry.content:
Hi Iwona,

It's a bug

 

Marc

entry.title: i_journalentry_tp dump FI_WT_AR_GET_WTAK
entry.content:
Hi team

I have this dump when i use i_journalentry_tp to post a Fi document

 

in my case y only create a demo code in a SE38 report using I_JOURNALENTRYTP 

    DATA lt_new TYPE TABLE FOR ACTION IMPORT i_journalentrytp~Post.

    INSERT VALUE #(
        %cid   = to_upper( cl_uuid_factory=>create_system_uuid( )->create_uuid_x16( ) )
        %param = VALUE #(
            companycode            = '1000'
            createdbyuser          = sy-uname
            accountingdocumenttype = 'SA'
            documentdate           = '20250108'
            postingdate            = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( )
            DocumentReferenceID    = |RAP: { sy-uname }|
            _glitems               = VALUE #(
*                ( glaccountlineitem = '1' glaccount = '0011002080' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '-100.55' currency = 'EUR' ) ) )
                ( glaccountlineitem = '1' glaccount = '824004' CostCenter = '12008'  _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '-10.55' currency = 'ARS' ) ) )
*                ( glaccountlineitem = '2' glaccount = '0070200000' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '100.55' currency = 'EUR' ) ) ) ) ) )
                ( glaccountlineitem = '2' glaccount = '130011' _currencyamount = VALUE #( ( journalentryitemamount = '10.55' currency = 'ARS' ) ) ) ) ) )
           INTO TABLE lt_new.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_journalentrytp
           ENTITY journalentry
           EXECUTE post FROM lt_new
           FAILED DATA(ls_failed_deep)
           REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_deep).


but I have a dump. My system is S/4HANA private edition 2023


I debug and jump over the function in update task, because the table parameter LT_WTAK was empty in may case 

and then it works  

but I don't understand why the I_journalentry_tp call this function module as FB01 do if behaviour can't call functions in update task 


Could someone solve this dump?

Best regards!

entry.title: Re: Online Search feature not supported with download all option introduced in SSAM 2310
entry.content: Please check OnlineSearch.page, in bottom it have download button which work if we enable Select All button but action is not there for download.

entry.title: Re: Scanning in app "Manage Physical Inventory Count" doe...
entry.content: Hi, I am facing the same issue. Did you able to find the solution?

entry.title: Define data mapping for CSV file to ACDOCU
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have case to upload data (non-integrate company) use GRDC, I have created define data mapping with source file as CSV file and target aim to ACDOCU table.

The template containing as picture below:

I use semicolon as separator when we open the file template use notepad then you will see the separator in CSV file is same with the separator setting in "define data mapping" app,

When I run data mapping, I uploaded the the csv file then the error occurred as below:

for information I used 0C as document type.

questions:

1. what is the step to solve the error?

2. is that template mapping that I uploaded through define data mapping (XLXS file) and run data mapping (CSV file) are the same template with the same data?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certification exam for India region From SAP Training S
entry.content: i checked yesterday and found myself that all my previous cases had been deleted, I even created a new case regarding subscription booking, after few minutes it got disappeared. Did it happen to anyone?

entry.title: Solman requirements
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

 

We have only one Productive Solman system for all the Gerdau systems, so we don't have a test environment to perform these PERSON_NAME recommendations, so we have to be really careful, could you help me address the requirements bellow please ?

 

As part of SAP Health Checking/PERSON_NAME recommendations, we received a recommendation to enable SSL communication in our Solman system. 

 

First doubt: the recommendation refers to the Java SID of our Solman system (SJ0). However, we also have the ABAP SID (SM0)..
I am unsure if we should set up HTTPS only in Java or also in ABAP layer..

 

Also.. which caution do we have to take to implement this ? do we have to modify any RFCs on ABAP side ? do we have to modify any connections on Java
side ? which/where ? do we also have to create certificates signed by certification authority in other systems to accomplish this ?
Would we also require to implement SNC certificate on ABAP side or just TLS ?
Should we use the same certificates signed by certificate authority in JAVA and ABAP layer ?

 

The recommendation (JE143) says:
"SSL is not set up or the default(self-signed) certificate is used. Ensure secure communication by using SSL certificates only. 
A default certificate should be replaced by a "real" certificate, signed by a proper certification authority. After applying the recommendation for SSL configuration, several parameters should be adjusted accordingly".

 

It doesn't say which parameters have to be modified and it does not point to any KB..

 

“Please refer to the following two sections” => Then it points to other two recommendations(JE167 and JE166) that seems to the same (same description),
which require SSL to be implemented in advance from my understanding.

 

I can't tell the difference between these:
-Secure Attribute for Security Session ID Cookie (JE167)
-Secure Attribute for System Cookie (JE166). 

 

Description: "If the property is set to true, then the secure attribute is set to the system cookies and the cookies marked as secure will only be transmitted if the communications channel is a secure one (https)"

 

And we also have this one to implement:
-Enforce SSL encryption for Transfer of SAP Logon Tickets (JE139). 

 

Then it points to a KB that does not exist (DIGITS) - where do I find the corresponding steps ? Is it something to be prepared after implementing SSL or something to be done in parallel ? :

 

"Use SSL at least between the client and the first load balancer or reverse proxy.
See SAP Note DIGITS (Switching to HTTPS Transport Layer Security) and SAP Note DIGITS (SSL tips for preventing 
hijacking).
Use DNS aliases in a separate subdomain for accessing the portal and the integrated systems (See other issue for details).

 

After you have implemented SSL (at least between the browsers and the load balancers of the portal and all directly accessible integrated systems), set "ume.logon.security.enforce_secure_cookie" to "True", so that the SAP Logon Ticket can only be sent via HTTPS connections".

 


Please let me know,

 

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solman requirements
entry.content:
Hello Customer,

 

Could you please review the following KBAs:
510007 - Setting up SSL on Application Server ABAP
2445947 - [WEBINAR] Setting up SSL on NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP
1770585 - How to configure SSL on the AS Java

During Transaction SOLMAN_SETUP for Infrastructure Preparation your can configure HTTPs and SSL too, for example within Infrastructure Preparation, step Set Up Connectivity.

Later you may also get in touch with SSL if needed for other Solution Manager parts such as Diagnostic Agents and Enterprise Manager.
2322555 - Connect the Diagnostics Agent to Solution Manager 7.2 using SSL
2268643 - How to configure the P4S port with Solution Manager 7.2
2516194 - How to enable SSL Communication for Introscope Enterprise Manager and Introscope Host Adapters - SAP Solution Manager 7.1 and 7.2
2113268 - How to setup CA Introscope for SSL communication - SAP Solution Manager 7.1 and 7.2

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Copy data from one BTP ABAP Instance to Another BTP ABAP Instance
entry.content:
Hello @kaidehmann,

We would like to copy transaction & Master data from one BTP ABAP instance to another or within the same instance but different client. 

Currently we don't have any test or prod instance and lets say if we subscribe for new instance where we would like to copy the above data from the old instance.

Is there any tool/service available in the BTP ?

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Re: SAP PI for Beginners
entry.content:
This blog is so so great. It was a 13 year old blog in 2025 but still very useful and really help us.

Thank you so much for your hard work.

Regards,

Wises K.

entry.title: Re: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configu...
entry.content:
Hi Avinash,

The configuration date has no influence on the conventional product bundle. With multi-AVC BOM, the BOM components are determined based on valid from date maintained in the BOM, like you have also highlighted. The components can either be object dependent, i.e. based on certain characteristic attribute of the BOM or they can be defined to explode always without object dependency. Later case is similar to conventional product bundle with configuration date (Valid from) flexibility.

As far as Subscription order creation is concerned, by default the current date is considered for contract start date because of standard date profile. You can create your own custom date profile where the contract start date can be influenced using a desired custom date rule. In your case, the custom date rule assigned against contract start date should copy the configuration date to it. Thanks.

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: Re: SLED Change after testing
entry.content: system will extend the shelf life？what should i do to realize this?
